title: Universal Master
subtitle: A reusable shader foundation for environment assets, trimsheets, vertex blending, masks, and portfolio breakdowns.

breakdownSections.title: Shader Purpose
breakdownSections.notes: Explain what the Universal Master controls, what asset families use it, and why it avoids one-off material graphs.

breakdownSections.title: Parameter Groups
breakdownSections.notes: Document exposed controls for albedo, roughness, normal intensity, packed mask channels, trim offsets, and blend weights.

breakdownSections.title: Graph Architecture
breakdownSections.notes: Show the material function layout and the flow from texture inputs to final material attributes.

breakdownSections.title: Trimsheet Integration
breakdownSections.notes: Show UV conventions, trim ID usage, tile/offset controls, and asset examples using shared trims.

breakdownSections.title: PCG / Geometry Nodes Compatibility
breakdownSections.notes: Show how generated meshes receive material instances, masks, attributes, or randomization values.

breakdownSections.title: Optimization Notes
breakdownSections.notes: Track shader complexity, texture memory, static switches, instance count, and platform notes.
